name: RollerPlay
short_description: RollerPlay is VR Rhythm Runner. You can also play it in non VR mode on a monitor. With multiple control modes including one for intense exercise. Powerful visual editor. Create your own levels with game tracks or external music. No restrictions for streamers. Supports LIV.
detailed_description: RollerPlay is Rhythm Runner. In this game you control a skater on futuristic transportation lanes and all your actions match the music beats. A Rhythm Runner designed for Virtual Reality. But you can also play it in non VR mode on a monitor. With multiple control modes including one for intense exercise. Includes powerful visual editor where you can create your own levels with game tracks or external music. No restrictions for streamers for any music included in the game. Supports LIV mixed reality platform.
